sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Coca-Cola takes on Olipop and Poppi with new prebiotic soda brand, Simply Pop
feed.summary: The U.S. prebiotic soda category has more than doubled over the last five years.

feed.title: Jim Simons' Renaissance Technologies Makes AI Moves: Sells Big Tech, Buys Chinese Stocks, Robinhood In Q4 - Alibaba Gr Hldgs  ( NYSE:BABA ) , Alphabet  ( NASDAQ:GOOGL )
feed.summary: Late investor Jim Simons' fund Renaissance Technologies LLC made some significant changes within its artificial intelligence bets during the fourth quarter of 2024. The 13F SEC filings reveal that Renaissance increased its stake in a few Asia-based AI companies during the quarter.

feed.title: FDA Approves GSK's 5-in-1 Meningococcal Vaccine For Adolescents Ahead Of CDC Advisory Committee Vote Meeting Next Week - GSK  ( NYSE:GSK )
feed.summary: The FDA approved GSK's Penmenvy vaccine for ages 10-25, targeting five major meningococcal serogroups: A, B, C, W, and Y. Phase 3 trials with 4,800 participants showed the vaccine has a safety profile consistent with GSK's existing meningococcal vaccines.

feed.title: Tesla Files Fresh Lawsuit Against Matthews After Court Defeat - Tesla  ( NASDAQ:TSLA ) , Matthews International  ( NASDAQ:MATW )

feed.title: Baidu Q4 Earnings: AI Cloud Grows, Margin Slides, Expects AI Investments To Bear Fruit In 2025 - Baidu  ( NASDAQ:BIDU )
feed.summary: Baidu beats Q4 estimates with $4.68B revenue and $2.63 EPS, but stock dips as AI models lag behind rivals like Alibaba and DeepSeek. Baidu's AI Cloud revenue jumps 26%, as CEO Robin Li calls 2024 a pivotal year in shifting to an AI-first business strategy.
